{{Quote|We are en route to Daemen to enroll three hundred and nine young people in the Clarion Scholars Academy.|Pilot of the Lark|<ref name="E9" />}}
'''Daemen''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], the [[Camblian Order]]<ref name="E9" /> from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]<ref name="EAOC" /> world of [[Eedoq]] sent 309 prospective students to be enrolled at the [[Clarion Scholars Academy]] on the planet Daemen. However, their transport ship, the ''[[Lark]]'', was destroyed during the journey by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pilot [[Tars Nandy]], resulting in the deaths of all 309 children.<ref name="E9" />

During the final years of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], the [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] agent [[Bey]] ended his career, reclaimed his [[Voidrunner|own ship]] from an impound lot on Daemen, and spent several more years as a vigilante on the Rim.<ref name="CP">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-12-tales-of-the-new-republic|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 12: Tales of the New Republic}}</ref>
